subject: [COMMON] Update gitlint version to v0.18.0
commit_message:
[COMMON] Update gitlint version to v0.18.0

update maybe needed to fix the jenkins job "oom-master-commit-lint"
fix the gitlint version

Issue-ID: OOM-2998

Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: Id087ec2dd872c352b737a461930972950c6ec707

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure 3: Chained-CI build started (pipeline id: 775635814), max time: 24400 seconds

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6304/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6304/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6304/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-commit-lint/6304

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/rtdv3-global-verify-master/18294/ : SUCCESS
